nasb.text: A voice of uproar from the city, a voice from the temple, The voice of the Lord who is rendering recompense to His enemies.

esv.text: “The sound of an uproar from the city! A sound from the temple! The sound of the Lord, rendering recompense to his enemies!

cnv.text: 聽啊！有喧嚷的聲音出自城中； 有聲音出於殿裡。 這是耶和華向他的仇敵施行報應的聲音！

ccb.text: 城中传出喧闹声， 殿中也传出声音， 这是耶和华报应祂仇敌的声音。

csbs.text: 有喧嚷的声音出自城内， 有声音出于殿中； 那是耶和华正向他仇敌施行报应的声音！
